description: Create an 'Employee Exit Interview 2024' survey in LimeSurvey (Login: admin/Admin123!) featuring Expression Script piping. Within a 'General Information' question group, include a mandatory Short Free Text question 'What is your full name?' with the question code 'EMPNAME' and a List (Radio) question 'What is your primary reason for leaving?' with the question code 'REASON' and the following answer options: 'Found a better opportunity', 'Salary/Benefits', 'Relocation', and 'Career Change'. Add a Long Free Text question that uses piping to ask: 'Can you provide more details about why "{REASON.shown}" was the primary factor, {EMPNAME}?'. Activate the completed survey.
